rulings.Case Title: GLEN LEIS ET AL VS. AJLOUN ENTERPRISES LLC ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: Motion For Order Transferring And Notice Of Hearing
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Tuesday March 1, 2016, line 1. DEFENDANT AJLOUN ENTERPRISES LLC, MATHEW ZGHOUL, IHSAN ZGHOUL, MUSAB ZGHOUL, MOHAMMED ZGHOUL Motion For Order Transferring And Notice Of Hearing continued to March 14, 2016 on Court's own motion. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: TONY K FONG VS. HUANZHI JIANG ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Motion For An Order Compelling Appearance And Production Of Documents At Continued Deposition And For Monetary Sanctions Against Defendant Cross-Complainant Huanzhi Jiang
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Tuesday March 1, 2016, line 2. PLAINTIFF TONY FONG Notice Of Motion And Motion For An Order Compelling Appearance And Production Of Documents At Continued Deposition And For Monetary Sanctions Against Defendant Cross-Complainant Huanzhi Jiang GRANTED as follows: 1. Defendant shall provide all the documents requested in the Notice of Deposition within 5 days of notice of entry of order; 2. Defendant shall appear for deposition and on a date set by Plaintiff no later than March 18, 2016; 3. If Defendant fails to comply with (1) or (2) sanctions are granted in the amount of $2,310 to be paid no later than March 25, 2016. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: HOUSING RIGHTS COMMITTEE OF SAN FRANCISCO VS. VIC YANG ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion Of Plaintiffs To Compel Defendant Vic Yangs Discovery Responses And Request For Monetary Sanctions
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Tuesday March 1, 2016, line 3. PLAINTIFF HOUSING RIGHTS COMMITTEE OF SAN FRANCISCO, UCHIDA STEVEN Notice Of Motion Of Plaintiffs To Compel Defendant Vic Yangs Discovery Responses And Request For Monetary Sanctions GRANTED in part and DENIED in part. No opposition filed. Motion is GRANTED as to Requests for Production 1-7 and as to Special Interrogatories 4 and 5. Motion is DENIED as to Special Interrogatories 19 and 20, which have not been identified in January 12, 2016 meet and confer letter (Exhibit F). Request for Sanctions is GRANTED in the amount of $870. Moving party is ordered to comply with CRC, including 2.1113 in future. All future discovery motions to be filed in department 301 per SFLR 8. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: HOUSING RIGHTS COMMITTEE OF SAN FRANCISCO VS. VIC YANG ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion Of Plaintiffs To Compel The Deposition Of Defendant Vic Yang And Request For Monetary Sanctions Against Defendant Vic Yang
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Tuesday March 1, 2016, line 3. PLAINTIFF HOUSING RIGHTS COMMITTEE OF SAN FRANCISCO, UCHIDA STEVEN Notice Of Motion Of Plaintiffs To Compel The Deposition Of Defendant Vic Yang And Request For Monetary Sanctions Against Defendant Vic Yang DENIED. Notice is addressed to "Rob Wang" and "Vic Wang" and provides for two different deposition locations. No evidence presented that pro per defendant agreed to e-mail service of Amended Notice. No copy of Amended Notice attached. All future discovery motions to be filed in department 301 per SFLR 8. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: BALLYHALLINAN FAMILY LP VS. THOMAS SORCE ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Motion To Compel Responses To Discovery, To Extablish Admisions From Defendant, And Request For Monetary Sanction Against Defendant
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Tuesday March 1, 2016, line 6. PLAINTIFF BALLYHALLINAN FAMILY LP Notice Of Motion And Motion To Compel Responses To Discovery, To Extablish Admisions From Defendant, And Request For Monetary Sanction Against Defendant GRANTED, subject to opposition. Complete verified responses without objections to Form Interrogatories, Special Interrogatories and Request for Production shall by provided by hand-delivery within 5 days of notice of entry of order. Admissions are deemed admitted. Sanctions granted in the amount of $1,110.

rulings.Calendar Matter: MOTION TO QUASH SERVICE OF SUMMONS OR STAY OR DISMISS
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Tuesday March 1, 2016, line 7. DEFENDANT MARY BRANGER, JAN BRANGER MOTION TO QUASH SERVICE OF SUMMONS OR STAY OR DISMISS OFF CALENDAR, moving party failed to comply with CCP 1167.4.
